problem: Implement a new 'hlx library' CLI module with commands for listing library items, showing reports with section annotations, and posting/listing section-level comments. Requires new src/library/ module, resolve-library-item utility, and SKILL.md update for agent discoverability. This is Phase 2b (parallel with client).

files.why: Main CLI router (129 lines). Switch-based command dispatch. Must add 'library' case importing and calling a new runLibrary function. Pattern: lines 87-90 (comments case) shows config loading and subcommand delegation.

Existing comments module router (53 lines). Pattern reference for the new library module: subcommand switch, help handling, configOrHelp usage, ticket resolution. Library module follows the same shape but with library-specific resolution.
Pattern reference for cmdList implementation. Shows hxFetch usage, response formatting, flag parsing.
Pattern reference for cmdPost implementation. Shows hxFetch POST, message extraction from args.
Ticket resolution utility (128 lines). Pattern reference for resolve-library-item.ts. Shows extractTicketRef, matchTicket (by ID, shortId, numeric number), and resolveTicket API call pattern.
HTTP client (hxFetch) with retry, timeout, backoff. All new library commands use this for API calls.
Flag parsing utilities (getFlag, isHelpRequested). New commands will use --section, --rating flags.
Config types (HxConfig) and loading (requireConfig, loadConfig). All commands receive HxConfig.
Agent skill documentation. Must add Library section documenting hlx library list, show, comments list, comments post commands. Lines 31-50 show the command table that needs new entries.
Build: 'tsc'. Typecheck: 'tsc --noEmit'. Test: 'tsc && node --test dist/**/*.test.js'. No new dependencies needed.

facts: CLI uses switch-based routing in src/index.ts. Each command has its own module directory (comments/, inspect/, tickets/, org/, etc.).
No src/library/ directory exists yet. This is a net-new module.
HTTP client: hxFetch in src/lib/http.ts with retry (3 attempts), timeout (30s), exponential backoff.
Flag parsing: getFlag for named flags (--ticket, --section, --rating), isHelpRequested for --help/-h.

Ticket resolution pattern: extractTicketRef (--ticket flag > HELIX_TICKET_ID env > positional arg), then resolveTicket API call to /tickets endpoint. Library item resolution will be similar but against /library/items endpoint.
Build output goes to dist/. Entry point: dist/index.js. Package is @projectxinnovation/helix-cli v1.3.2.
SKILL.md is at skill-content/SKILL.md (not src/skill/). It's a markdown file with agent guidance, command tables, and workflow examples.

Existing 'hlx comments' module handles ticket-level comments. Library comments are a separate domain with different API endpoints (/library/items/:itemId/comments), different flags (--section, --rating), and different resolution (library item ID vs ticket ID).
CLI rating flag values: thumbs-up/up, love, thumbs-down/down. Maps to server values: THUMBS_UP, LOVE, THUMBS_DOWN.
No test files exist for the existing comments module. New library module tests would follow the resolve-ticket.test.ts pattern.
unknowns: Whether the library list endpoint returns enough data for item resolution (shortId-based resolution requires knowing the ticket shortId, then finding the latest library item for that ticket).
Exact output formatting for 'hlx library show <ref>' - whether it fetches full report content via the API or just metadata with section headings.
Whether the CLI needs to render section annotations inline in the terminal output or just list sections with comment counts separately.
